These results show that agentic AI can facilitate the transition to self defending, proactive software supply chains rather than reactive verification ones.
tldr: The paper proposes an agentic AI framework using LLMs, RL, and multi-agent coordination for autonomous software supply chain security, demonstrating improved vulnerability detection and mitigation in CI/CD environments compared to baselines.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于LLM、RL和多智能体协作的智能AI框架，用于自主软件供应链安全。实验表明，与基线方法相比，该框架在CI/CD环境中能够更好地进行漏洞检测和缓解。
summary_zh: 软件供应链攻击正变得越来越集中于可信的开发和交付流程，因此传统的构建后完整性机制已无法使用。现有的框架，如SLSA、SBOM和in toto，主要用于提供来源和可追溯性，但并不具备主动识别和消除软件生产中漏洞的能力。本文提出了一种基于自主软件供应链安全的 Agentic 人工智能（AI）示例，它结合了基于大型语言模型（LLM）的推理、强化学习（RL）以及多智能体协同。所提出的系统利用在LangChain和LangGraph的帮助下协调的专用安全Agent，通过模型上下文协议（MCP）与实际的CI/CD环境通信，并将所有观察和行动记录在区块链安全账本中，以确保完整性和审计。强化学习可用于实现自适应缓解策略，这些策略考虑了安全有效性与运营开销之间的平衡，而LLM可用于实现语义漏洞分析以及可解释的决策。该框架基于模拟的流水线以及GitHub Actions和Jenkins上的实际CI/CD集成进行了测试，包括注入攻击、不安全的反序列化、访问控制违规和配置错误。实验结果表明，与基于规则的、仅来源的和仅RL的基线相比，检测准确率更高，缓解延迟更短，构建时间开销合理。这些结果表明，Agentic AI可以促进向自防御、主动型软件供应链的过渡，而不是被动的验证。

title: The World Is Bigger! A Computationally-Embedded Perspective on the Big World Hypothesis
summary: Continual learning is often motivated by the idea, known as the big world hypothesis, that "the world is bigger" than the agent. Recent problem formulations capture this idea by explicitly constraining an agent relative to the environment. These constraints lead to solutions in which the agent continually adapts to best use its limited capacity, rather than converging to a fixed solution. However, explicit constraints can be ad hoc, difficult to incorporate, and may limit the effectiveness of scaling up the agent's capacity. In this paper, we characterize a problem setting in which an agent, regardless of its capacity, is constrained by being embedded in the environment. In particular, we introduce a computationally-embedded perspective that represents an embedded agent as an automaton simulated within a universal (formal) computer. Such an automaton is always constrained; we prove that it is equivalent to an agent that interacts with a partially observable Markov decision process over a countably infinite state-space. We propose an objective for this setting, which we call interactivity, that measures an agent's ability to continually adapt its behaviour by learning new predictions. We then develop a model-based reinforcement learning algorithm for interactivity-seeking, and use it to construct a synthetic problem to evaluate continual learning capability. Our results show that deep nonlinear networks struggle to sustain interactivity, whereas deep linear networks sustain higher interactivity as capacity increases.
tldr: This paper introduces a computationally-embedded perspective on continual learning, modeling agents as automata within a universal computer and proposing an "interactivity" objective, showing deep linear networks outperform deep nonlinear networks in sustaining it.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了持续学习的计算嵌入视角，将agent建模为通用计算机中的自动机，并提出了“交互性”目标，结果表明深度线性网络在维持交互性方面优于深度非线性网络。
summary_zh: 持续学习的动机通常源于一个被称为“大世界假说”的理念，即“世界比智能体更大”。最近的问题表述捕捉了这一理念，通过显式地约束智能体相对于环境的能力来实现。这些约束导致智能体不断适应，以最佳地利用其有限的能力，而不是收敛到一个固定的解决方案。然而，显式的约束可能是临时的、难以融入的，并且可能限制智能体能力扩展的有效性。在本文中，我们描述了一种问题设置，其中智能体，无论其能力如何，都会因嵌入到环境中而受到约束。具体来说，我们引入了一种计算嵌入视角，将嵌入式智能体表示为在通用（形式）计算机中模拟的自动机。这样的自动机总是受到约束的；我们证明它等价于一个与可数无限状态空间上的部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程进行交互的智能体。我们为这种设置提出了一个目标，我们称之为交互性，它衡量了智能体通过学习新的预测来持续调整其行为的能力。然后，我们开发了一种基于模型的强化学习算法来寻求交互性，并使用它来构建一个合成问题，以评估持续学习能力。我们的结果表明，深度非线性网络难以维持交互性，而深度线性网络随着能力增加可以维持更高的交互性。

title: Rethinking the Spatio-Temporal Alignment of End-to-End 3D Perception
summary: Spatio-temporal alignment is crucial for temporal modeling of end-to-end (E2E) perception in autonomous driving (AD), providing valuable structural and textural prior information. Existing methods typically rely on the attention mechanism to align objects across frames, simplifying the motion model with a unified explicit physical model (constant velocity, etc.). These approaches prefer semantic features for implicit alignment, challenging the importance of explicit motion modeling in the traditional perception paradigm. However, variations in motion states and object features across categories and frames render this alignment suboptimal. To address this, we propose HAT, a spatio-temporal alignment module that allows each object to adaptively decode the optimal alignment proposal from multiple hypotheses without direct supervision. Specifically, HAT first utilizes multiple explicit motion models to generate spatial anchors and motion-aware feature proposals for historical instances. It then performs multi-hypothesis decoding by incorporating semantic and motion cues embedded in cached object queries, ultimately providing the optimal alignment proposal for the target frame. On nuScenes, HAT consistently improves 3D temporal detectors and trackers across diverse baselines. It achieves state-of-the-art tracking results with 46.0% AMOTA on the test set when paired with the DETR3D detector. In an object-centric E2E AD method, HAT enhances perception accuracy (+1.3% mAP, +3.1% AMOTA) and reduces the collision rate by 32%. When semantics are corrupted (nuScenes-C), the enhancement of motion modeling by HAT enables more robust perception and planning in the E2E AD.
tldr: The paper introduces HAT, a spatio-temporal alignment module that adaptively learns optimal alignment proposals for 3D object detection and tracking in autonomous driving, improving performance and robustness, especially under semantic corruption.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为HAT的时空对齐模块，它能够自适应地学习3D物体检测和跟踪的最佳对齐方案，从而提高自动驾驶的性能和鲁棒性，尤其是在语义损坏的情况下。
summary_zh: 时空对齐对于自动驾驶（AD）中端到端（E2E）感知的时间建模至关重要，它提供了有价值的结构和纹理先验信息。现有方法通常依赖于注意力机制来对齐跨帧的对象，并使用统一的显式物理模型（例如，恒定速度）简化运动模型。这些方法倾向于使用语义特征进行隐式对齐，这挑战了传统感知范式中显式运动建模的重要性。然而，不同类别和帧之间的运动状态和对象特征的差异使得这种对齐变得次优。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了HAT，一个时空对齐模块，它允许每个对象自适应地从多个假设中解码最佳对齐提案，而无需直接监督。具体来说，HAT首先利用多个显式运动模型为历史实例生成空间锚点和具有运动感知能力的特征提案。然后，它通过结合嵌入在缓存对象查询中的语义和运动线索来执行多假设解码，最终为目标帧提供最佳的对齐提案。在nuScenes数据集上，HAT持续改进了各种基线的3D时序检测器和跟踪器。当与DETR3D检测器配对时，它在测试集上实现了最先进的跟踪结果，AMOTA为46.0%。在一个以对象为中心的E2E AD方法中，HAT提高了感知精度（+1.3% mAP, +3.1% AMOTA）并将碰撞率降低了32%。当语义信息被破坏时（nuScenes-C），HAT对运动建模的增强使E2E AD中的感知和规划更具鲁棒性。

title: Direct Diffusion Score Preference Optimization via Stepwise Contrastive Policy-Pair Supervision
summary: Diffusion models have achieved impressive results in generative tasks such as text-to-image synthesis, yet they often struggle to fully align outputs with nuanced user intent and maintain consistent aesthetic quality. Existing preference-based training methods like Diffusion Direct Preference Optimization help address these issues but rely on costly and potentially noisy human-labeled datasets. In this work, we introduce Direct Diffusion Score Preference Optimization (DDSPO), which directly derives per-timestep supervision from winning and losing policies when such policies are available. Unlike prior methods that operate solely on final samples, DDSPO provides dense, transition-level signals across the denoising trajectory. In practice, we avoid reliance on labeled data by automatically generating preference signals using a pretrained reference model: we contrast its outputs when conditioned on original prompts versus semantically degraded variants. This practical strategy enables effective score-space preference supervision without explicit reward modeling or manual annotations. Empirical results demonstrate that DDSPO improves text-image alignment and visual quality, outperforming or matching existing preference-based methods while requiring significantly less supervision. Our implementation is available at: https://dohyun-as.github.io/DDSPO
tldr: The paper introduces Direct Diffusion Score Preference Optimization (DDSPO), a method for improving text-to-image diffusion models by using contrastive learning with a reference model to generate preference signals, thereby avoiding costly human labeling. DDSPO enhances text-image alignment and visual quality more efficiently than existing preference-based methods.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了Direct Diffusion Score Preference Optimization (DDSPO)，该方法通过使用参考模型的对比学习生成偏好信号，从而改进文本到图像的扩散模型，避免了昂贵的人工标注。DDSPO比现有的基于偏好的方法更有效地增强了文本图像对齐和视觉质量。
summary_zh: 扩散模型在文本-图像合成等生成任务中取得了令人瞩目的成果，但它们常常难以完全对齐输出与细微的用户意图，并维持一致的审美质量。现有的基于偏好的训练方法，如扩散直接偏好优化，有助于解决这些问题，但依赖于昂贵且可能带有噪声的人工标注数据集。在这项工作中，我们引入了直接扩散分数偏好优化（DDSPO），它在输赢策略可用时，直接从输赢策略中导出每个时间步长的监督信号。与先前仅对最终样本进行操作的方法不同，DDSPO在去噪轨迹中提供了密集的、过渡级别的信号。在实践中，我们通过使用预训练的参考模型自动生成偏好信号来避免对标注数据的依赖：我们将原始提示的条件输出与语义降级变体的条件输出进行对比。这种实用的策略实现了有效的分数空间偏好监督，而无需显式的奖励建模或手动标注。实验结果表明，DDSPO提高了文本-图像的对齐性和视觉质量，在需要显著更少监督的情况下，优于或匹配现有的基于偏好的方法。我们的实现可在以下网址获取：https://dohyun-as.github.io/DDSPO

title: CME-CAD: Heterogeneous Collaborative Multi-Expert Reinforcement Learning for CAD Code Generation
summary: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) is essential in industrial design, but the complexity of traditional CAD modeling and workflows presents significant challenges for automating the generation of high-precision, editable CAD models. Existing methods that reconstruct 3D models from sketches often produce non-editable and approximate models that fall short of meeting the stringent requirements for precision and editability in industrial design. Moreover, the reliance on text or image-based inputs often requires significant manual annotation, limiting their scalability and applicability in industrial settings. To overcome these challenges, we propose the Heterogeneous Collaborative Multi-Expert Reinforcement Learning (CME-CAD) paradigm, a novel training paradigm for CAD code generation. Our approach integrates the complementary strengths of these models, facilitating collaborative learning and improving the model's ability to generate accurate, constraint-compatible, and fully editable CAD models. We introduce a two-stage training process: Multi-Expert Fine-Tuning (MEFT), and Multi-Expert Reinforcement Learning (MERL). Additionally, we present CADExpert, an open-source benchmark consisting of 17,299 instances, including orthographic projections with precise dimension annotations, expert-generated Chain-of-Thought (CoT) processes, executable CADQuery code, and rendered 3D models.
tldr: The paper introduces a novel reinforcement learning paradigm (CME-CAD) for generating editable CAD models from dimensioned orthographic projections using a multi-expert approach and a new benchmark dataset CADExpert.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种新的强化学习范例(CME-CAD)，用于通过多专家方法和新的基准数据集CADExpert，从带尺寸的正投影生成可编辑的CAD模型。
summary_zh: 计算机辅助设计 (CAD) 在工业设计中至关重要，但传统 CAD 建模和工作流程的复杂性给自动生成高精度、可编辑的 CAD 模型带来了重大挑战。现有的从草图重建三维模型的方法通常会生成不可编辑的近似模型，无法满足工业设计中对精度和可编辑性的严格要求。此外，对基于文本或图像输入的依赖通常需要大量的人工标注，从而限制了它们在工业环境中的可扩展性和适用性。为了克服这些挑战，我们提出了一种异构协作多专家强化学习 (CME-CAD) 范式，这是一种用于 CAD 代码生成的新型训练范式。我们的方法集成了这些模型的互补优势，促进了协作学习，并提高了模型生成精确、兼容约束且完全可编辑的 CAD 模型的能力。我们引入了一个两阶段的训练过程：多专家微调 (MEFT) 和多专家强化学习 (MERL)。此外，我们还推出了 CADExpert，这是一个包含 17,299 个实例的开源基准测试，其中包括带有精确尺寸标注的正交投影、专家生成的思维链 (CoT) 流程、可执行的 CADQuery 代码和渲染的 3D 模型。

title: AVOID: The Adverse Visual Conditions Dataset with Obstacles for Driving Scene Understanding
summary: Understanding road scenes for visual perception remains crucial for intelligent self-driving cars. In particular, it is desirable to detect unexpected small road hazards reliably in real-time, especially under varying adverse conditions (e.g., weather and daylight). However, existing road driving datasets provide large-scale images acquired in either normal or adverse scenarios only, and often do not contain the road obstacles captured in the same visual domain as for the other classes. To address this, we introduce a new dataset called AVOID, the Adverse Visual Conditions Dataset, for real-time obstacle detection collected in a simulated environment. AVOID consists of a large set of unexpected road obstacles located along each path captured under various weather and time conditions. Each image is coupled with the corresponding semantic and depth maps, raw and semantic LiDAR data, and waypoints, thereby supporting most visual perception tasks. We benchmark the results on high-performing real-time networks for the obstacle detection task, and also propose and conduct ablation studies using a comprehensive multi-task network for semantic segmentation, depth and waypoint prediction tasks.
tldr: The paper introduces AVOID, a new simulated driving dataset with obstacles under adverse conditions, designed for real-time obstacle detection and supports various visual perception tasks with rich annotations.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的模拟驾驶数据集AVOID，该数据集包含恶劣条件下的障碍物，专为实时障碍物检测而设计，并通过丰富的注释支持各种视觉感知任务。
summary_zh:
摘要：
理解道路场景以进行视觉感知对于智能自动驾驶汽车至关重要。 特别是，希望能够可靠地实时检测意外的小型道路危险，尤其是在各种不利条件下（例如，天气和日光）。 然而，现有的道路驾驶数据集仅提供在正常或不利场景中获得的大规模图像，并且通常不包含与其他类别在同一视觉域中捕获的道路障碍物。 为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个新的数据集，名为AVOID，即不利视觉条件数据集，用于在模拟环境中收集的实时障碍物检测。 AVOID由大量沿每个路径定位、在各种天气和时间条件下捕获的意外道路障碍物组成。 每个图像都与相应的语义和深度图、原始和语义 LiDAR 数据以及航点配对，从而支持大多数视觉感知任务。 我们对高性能实时网络在障碍物检测任务上进行了基准测试，并且还提出并使用全面的多任务网络进行语义分割、深度和航点预测任务进行了消融研究。

title: ISOPO: Proximal policy gradients without pi-old
summary: This note introduces Isometric Policy Optimization (ISOPO), an efficient method to approximate the natural policy gradient in a single gradient step. In comparison, existing proximal policy methods such as GRPO or CISPO use multiple gradient steps with variants of importance ratio clipping to approximate a natural gradient step relative to a reference policy. In its simplest form, ISOPO normalizes the log-probability gradient of each sequence in the Fisher metric before contracting with the advantages. Another variant of ISOPO transforms the microbatch advantages based on the neural tangent kernel in each layer. ISOPO applies this transformation layer-wise in a single backward pass and can be implemented with negligible computational overhead compared to vanilla REINFORCE.
tldr: ISOPO presents a new proximal policy optimization method that approximates natural policy gradients in a single step, potentially offering computational efficiency over existing methods like GRPO or CISPO. It achieves this through normalization of log-probability gradients and NTK-based advantage transformation.
tldr_zh: ISOPO提出了一种新的近端策略优化方法，它可以在单个步骤中逼近自然策略梯度，从而可能比现有的GRPO或CISPO等方法提供更高的计算效率。它通过归一化对数概率梯度和基于NTK的优势转换来实现这一点。
summary_zh: 本文介绍等距策略优化（Isometric Policy Optimization, ISOPO），一种以单步梯度更新来近似自然策略梯度的有效方法。相比之下，现有的近端策略方法，如GRPO或CISPO，使用多次梯度更新并结合重要性采样率裁剪的变体，以相对于参考策略来近似自然梯度步。在其最简单的形式中，ISOPO在与优势函数收缩之前，先根据费舍尔信息矩阵对每个序列的对数概率梯度进行归一化处理。ISOPO的另一个变体基于每一层的神经正切核变换微批次的优势函数。ISOPO以逐层的方式在单次反向传播中应用此变换，与原始REINFORCE相比，其计算开销可以忽略不计。

title: Evaluating Parameter Efficient Methods for RLVR
summary: We systematically evaluate Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods under the paradigm of Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR). RLVR incentivizes language models to enhance their reasoning capabilities through verifiable feedback; however, while methods like LoRA are commonly used, the optimal PEFT architecture for RLVR remains unidentified. In this work, we conduct the first comprehensive evaluation of over 12 PEFT methodologies across the DeepSeek-R1-Distill families on mathematical reasoning benchmarks. Our empirical results challenge the default adoption of standard LoRA with three main findings. First, we demonstrate that structural variants, such as DoRA, AdaLoRA, and MiSS, consistently outperform LoRA. Second, we uncover a spectral collapse phenomenon in SVD-informed initialization strategies (\textit{e.g.,} PiSSA, MiLoRA), attributing their failure to a fundamental misalignment between principal-component updates and RL optimization. Furthermore, our ablations reveal that extreme parameter reduction (\textit{e.g.,} VeRA, Rank-1) severely bottlenecks reasoning capacity. We further conduct ablation studies and scaling experiments to validate our findings. This work provides a definitive guide for advocating for more exploration for parameter-efficient RL methods.
tldr: The paper comprehensively evaluates various Parameter-Efficient Fine-Tuning (PEFT) methods within Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) for mathematical reasoning, identifying structural variants as superior to standard LoRA and highlighting spectral collapse issues in SVD-informed initializations.
tldr_zh: 该论文全面评估了基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）中用于数学推理的各种参数高效微调（PEFT）方法，发现结构变体优于标准LoRA，并强调了SVD初始化中的谱崩溃问题。
summary_zh: 我们系统地评估了在可验证奖励强化学习（RLVR）范式下的参数高效微调（PEFT）方法。RLVR通过可验证的反馈激励语言模型提升其推理能力；然而，虽然诸如LoRA之类的方法被广泛使用，但RLVR的最佳PEFT架构仍然未被确定。在这项工作中，我们对DeepSeek-R1-Distill系列模型在数学推理基准上进行了首次全面的评估，涵盖了超过12种PEFT方法。我们的实验结果对默认采用标准LoRA提出了挑战，并得出三个主要发现。首先，我们证明了结构变体，如DoRA、AdaLoRA和MiSS，始终优于LoRA。其次，我们揭示了SVD信息初始化策略（例如PiSSA、MiLoRA）中的谱塌陷现象，将其失败归因于主成分更新与RL优化之间的根本不匹配。此外，我们的消融实验表明，极端的参数缩减（例如VeRA、Rank-1）严重限制了推理能力。我们进一步进行了消融研究和缩放实验来验证我们的发现。这项工作为倡导更多对参数高效的RL方法进行探索提供了一个明确的指南。

title: Optimal Scalability-Aware Allocation of Swarm Robots: From Linear to Retrograde Performance via Marginal Gains
summary: In collective systems, the available agents are a limited resource that must be allocated among tasks to maximize collective performance. Computing the optimal allocation of several agents to numerous tasks through a brute-force approach can be infeasible, especially when each task's performance scales differently with the increase of agents. For example, difficult tasks may require more agents to achieve similar performances compared to simpler tasks, but performance may saturate nonlinearly as the number of allocated agents increases. We propose a computationally efficient algorithm, based on marginal performance gains, for optimally allocating agents to tasks with concave scalability functions, including linear, saturating, and retrograde scaling, to achieve maximum collective performance. We test the algorithm by allocating a simulated robot swarm among collective decision-making tasks, where embodied agents sample their environment and exchange information to reach a consensus on spatially distributed environmental features. We vary task difficulties by different geometrical arrangements of environmental features in space (patchiness). In this scenario, decision performance in each task scales either as a saturating curve (following the Condorcet's Jury Theorem in an interference-free setup) or as a retrograde curve (when physical interference among robots restricts their movement). Using simple robot simulations, we show that our algorithm can be useful in allocating robots among tasks. Our approach aims to advance the deployment of future real-world multi-robot systems.
tldr: This paper introduces an algorithm for optimally allocating swarm robots to tasks with varying scalability functions (linear, saturating, retrograde) to maximize collective system performance, demonstrating its effectiveness in a simulated collective decision-making scenario.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种算法，用于将集群机器人最优地分配给具有不同可扩展性函数（线性、饱和、逆行）的任务，以最大化集体系统性能，并在模拟的集体决策场景中展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 在集体系统中，可用的智能体是有限的资源，必须在任务间进行分配，以最大化集体性能。通过蛮力方法计算将多个智能体分配给大量任务的最优方案可能是不可行的，尤其当每个任务的性能随着智能体数目增加而以不同的方式扩展时。例如，相比于简单的任务，困难的任务可能需要更多的智能体才能达到相似的性能，但随着分配的智能体数量增加，性能可能会非线性地饱和。我们提出了一种基于边际性能增益的计算高效算法，用于在具有凹扩展函数的任务中优化分配智能体，这些扩展函数包括线性、饱和和倒退扩展，以实现最大的集体性能。我们通过将模拟机器人群分配到集体决策任务中来测试该算法，其中具身智能体采样它们的环境并交换信息，从而就空间分布的环境特征达成共识。我们通过空间中不同的环境特征几何排列（斑块性）来改变任务难度。在这种情况下，每个任务中的决策性能要么以饱和曲线进行扩展（遵循无干扰设置中的孔多塞陪审团定理），要么以倒退曲线进行扩展（当机器人之间的物理干扰限制了它们的运动时）。通过简单的机器人仿真，我们表明我们的算法可以用于在任务之间分配机器人。我们的方法旨在推进未来现实世界多机器人系统的部署。

title: Beyond URDF: The Universal Robot Description Directory for Shared, Extensible, and Standardized Robot Models
summary: Robots are typically described in software by specification files (e.g., URDF, SDF, MJCF, USD) that encode only basic kinematic, dynamic, and geometric information. As a result, downstream applications such as simulation, planning, and control must repeatedly re-derive richer data, leading to redundant computations, fragmented implementations, and limited standardization. In this work, we introduce the Universal Robot Description Directory (URDD), a modular representation that organizes derived robot information into structured, easy-to-parse JSON and YAML modules. Our open-source toolkit automatically generates URDDs from URDFs, with a Rust implementation supporting Bevy-based visualization. Additionally, we provide a JavaScript/Three.js viewer for web-based inspection of URDDs. Experiments on multiple robot platforms show that URDDs can be generated efficiently, encapsulate substantially richer information than standard specification files, and directly enable the construction of core robotics subroutines. URDD provides a unified, extensible resource for reducing redundancy and establishing shared standards across robotics frameworks. We conclude with a discussion on the limitations and implications of our work.
tldr: The paper introduces URDD, a modular representation and open-source toolkit designed to enhance robot descriptions by incorporating richer information than standard URDF files, aiming to reduce redundancy and promote standardization across robotics frameworks.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了URDD，一种模块化的表示形式和开源工具包，旨在通过包含比标准URDF文件更丰富的信息来增强机器人描述，从而减少冗余并促进机器人框架之间的标准化。
summary_zh: 机器人通常在软件中通过规范文件（例如，URDF、SDF、MJCF、USD）进行描述，这些文件仅编码基本的运动学、动力学和几何信息。因此，仿真、规划和控制等下游应用程序必须重复推导更丰富的数据，导致冗余计算、碎片化的实现和有限的标准化。 在本文中，我们介绍了通用机器人描述目录（URDD），这是一种模块化的表示形式，将派生的机器人信息组织成结构化的、易于解析的 JSON 和 YAML 模块。 我们的开源工具包可以自动从 URDF 生成 URDD，并提供支持基于 Bevy 的可视化的 Rust 实现。 此外，我们还提供了一个 JavaScript/Three.js 查看器，用于基于 Web 的 URDD 检查。 在多个机器人平台上的实验表明，URDD 可以有效地生成，封装比标准规范文件更丰富的信息，并直接支持构建核心机器人子程序。 URDD 提供了一个统一的、可扩展的资源，用于减少冗余，并在机器人框架之间建立共享标准。 最后，我们讨论了我们工作的局限性和意义。

title: APOLLO Blender: A Robotics Library for Visualization and Animation in Blender
summary: High-quality visualizations are an essential part of robotics research, enabling clear communication of results through figures, animations, and demonstration videos. While Blender is a powerful and freely available 3D graphics platform, its steep learning curve and lack of robotics-focused integrations make it difficult and time-consuming for researchers to use effectively. In this work, we introduce a lightweight software library that bridges this gap by providing simple scripting interfaces for common robotics visualization tasks. The library offers three primary capabilities: (1) importing robots and environments directly from standardized descriptions such as URDF; (2) Python-based scripting tools for keyframing robot states and visual attributes; and (3) convenient generation of primitive 3D shapes for schematic figures and animations. Together, these features allow robotics researchers to rapidly create publication-ready images, animations, and explanatory schematics without needing extensive Blender expertise. We demonstrate the library through a series of proof-of-concept examples and conclude with a discussion of current limitations and opportunities for future extensions.
tldr: The paper introduces APOLLO Blender, a Python library that simplifies robotics visualization and animation tasks within Blender by providing tools for importing robot models, scripting animations, and generating 3D shapes.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个名为APOLLO Blender的Python库，它通过提供导入机器人模型、编写动画脚本和生成3D形状的工具，简化了Blender中的机器人可视化和动画任务。
summary_zh: 高质量的可视化是机器人研究的重要组成部分，它能够通过图表、动画和演示视频清晰地传递结果。虽然 Blender 是一个功能强大的且免费的3D图形平台，但其陡峭的学习曲线和缺乏以机器人为中心的集成使得研究人员难以有效且耗时地使用它。在这项工作中，我们介绍了一个轻量级的软件库，通过为常见的机器人可视化任务提供简单的脚本接口来弥补这一差距。该库提供三个主要功能：（1）直接从诸如URDF等标准化描述中导入机器人和环境；（2）基于 Python 的脚本工具，用于关键帧机器人状态和视觉属性；以及（3）便捷地生成原始3D形状，用于示意图和动画。总之，这些功能允许机器人研究人员快速创建可用于出版的图像、动画和解释性示意图，而无需丰富的 Blender 专业知识。我们通过一系列概念验证示例来展示该库，并以讨论当前局限性和未来扩展机会作为总结。

title: MCI-Net: A Robust Multi-Domain Context Integration Network for Point Cloud Registration
summary: Robust and discriminative feature learning is critical for high-quality point cloud registration. However, existing deep learning-based methods typically rely on Euclidean neighborhood-based strategies for feature extraction, which struggle to effectively capture the implicit semantics and structural consistency in point clouds. To address these issues, we propose a multi-domain context integration network (MCI-Net) that improves feature representation and registration performance by aggregating contextual cues from diverse domains. Specifically, we propose a graph neighborhood aggregation module, which constructs a global graph to capture the overall structural relationships within point clouds. We then propose a progressive context interaction module to enhance feature discriminability by performing intra-domain feature decoupling and inter-domain context interaction. Finally, we design a dynamic inlier selection method that optimizes inlier weights using residual information from multiple iterations of pose estimation, thereby improving the accuracy and robustness of registration. Extensive experiments on indoor RGB-D and outdoor LiDAR datasets show that the proposed MCI-Net significantly outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods, achieving the highest registration recall of 96.4\% on 3DMatch. Source code is available at http://www.linshuyuan.com.
tldr: The paper introduces MCI-Net, a novel point cloud registration network that uses multi-domain context integration to improve feature representation and registration performance, achieving state-of-the-art results on indoor and outdoor datasets.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为MCI-Net的新型点云配准网络，该网络利用多域上下文集成来提高特征表示和配准性能，并在室内和室外数据集上取得了最先进的结果。
summary_zh: 鲁棒且具有区分性的特征学习对于高质量点云配准至关重要。然而，现有的基于深度学习的方法通常依赖于基于欧几里得邻域的策略进行特征提取，难以有效地捕捉点云中隐含的语义和结构一致性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种多域上下文集成网络(MCI-Net)，通过聚合来自不同领域的上下文线索来改善特征表示和配准性能。具体而言，我们提出了一种图邻域聚合模块，该模块构建全局图以捕捉点云内的整体结构关系。然后，我们提出了一种渐进上下文交互模块，通过执行域内特征解耦和域间上下文交互来增强特征的区分性。最后，我们设计了一种动态内点选择方法，该方法使用来自姿态估计多次迭代的残差信息来优化内点权重，从而提高配准的准确性和鲁棒性。在室内RGB-D和室外LiDAR数据集上的大量实验表明，所提出的MCI-Net显著优于现有的最先进方法，在3DMatch上实现了96.4%的最高配准召回率。源代码可在http://www.linshuyuan.com获取。

title: Automated river gauge plate reading using a hybrid object detection and generative AI framework in the Limpopo River Basin
summary: Accurate and continuous monitoring of river water levels is essential for flood forecasting, water resource management, and ecological protection. Traditional hydrological observation methods are often limited by manual measurement errors and environmental constraints. This study presents a hybrid framework integrating vision based waterline detection, YOLOv8 pose scale extraction, and large multimodal language models (GPT 4o and Gemini 2.0 Flash) for automated river gauge plate reading. The methodology involves sequential stages of image preprocessing, annotation, waterline detection, scale gap estimation, and numeric reading extraction. Experiments demonstrate that waterline detection achieved high precision of 94.24 percent and an F1 score of 83.64 percent, while scale gap detection provided accurate geometric calibration for subsequent reading extraction. Incorporating scale gap metadata substantially improved the predictive performance of LLMs, with Gemini Stage 2 achieving the highest accuracy, with a mean absolute error of 5.43 cm, root mean square error of 8.58 cm, and R squared of 0.84 under optimal image conditions. Results highlight the sensitivity of LLMs to image quality, with degraded images producing higher errors, and underscore the importance of combining geometric metadata with multimodal artificial intelligence for robust water level estimation. Overall, the proposed approach offers a scalable, efficient, and reliable solution for automated hydrological monitoring, demonstrating potential for real time river gauge digitization and improved water resource management.
tldr: This paper proposes a hybrid vision and large multimodal model framework for automated river gauge plate reading, achieving promising accuracy in water level estimation by integrating YOLOv8, GPT-4o, and Gemini 2.0, though performance is affected by image quality.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种混合视觉和大型多模态模型框架，用于自动读取河流水位计，通过整合YOLOv8、GPT-4o和Gemini 2.0，在水位估计方面取得了有希望的准确性，但性能受到图像质量的影响。
summary_zh: 河流水位的精确和连续监测对于洪水预报、水资源管理和生态保护至关重要。传统水文观测方法常常受到人工测量误差和环境约束的限制。本研究提出了一种混合框架，该框架集成了基于视觉的水线检测、YOLOv8姿态刻度提取和大型多模态语言模型（GPT 4o和Gemini 2.0 Flash），用于自动水位尺读数。该方法包括图像预处理、标注、水线检测、刻度间隙估计和数值读数提取等顺序阶段。实验表明，水线检测实现了94.24%的高精确率和83.64%的F1分数，而刻度间隙检测为后续读数提取提供了精确的几何校准。纳入刻度间隙元数据显著提高了LLM的预测性能，其中Gemini Stage 2在最佳图像条件下实现了最高的精度，平均绝对误差为5.43厘米，均方根误差为8.58厘米，且决定系数R平方为0.84。结果突出了LLM对图像质量的敏感性，降级的图像会产生更高的误差，并强调了将几何元数据与多模态人工智能相结合对于稳健的水位估计的重要性。总体而言，提出的方法为自动化水文监测提供了一种可扩展、高效和可靠的解决方案，展示了实时水位尺数字化和改进水资源管理的潜力。

title: YOLO-Master: MOE-Accelerated with Specialized Transformers for Enhanced Real-time Detection
summary: Existing Real-Time Object Detection (RTOD) methods commonly adopt YOLO-like architectures for their favorable trade-off between accuracy and speed. However, these models rely on static dense computation that applies uniform processing to all inputs, misallocating representational capacity and computational resources such as over-allocating on trivial scenes while under-serving complex ones. This mismatch results in both computational redundancy and suboptimal detection performance. To overcome this limitation, we propose YOLO-Master, a novel YOLO-like framework that introduces instance-conditional adaptive computation for RTOD. This is achieved through a Efficient Sparse Mixture-of-Experts (ES-MoE) block that dynamically allocates computational resources to each input according to its scene complexity. At its core, a lightweight dynamic routing network guides expert specialization during training through a diversity enhancing objective, encouraging complementary expertise among experts. Additionally, the routing network adaptively learns to activate only the most relevant experts, thereby improving detection performance while minimizing computational overhead during inference. Comprehensive experiments on five large-scale benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of YOLO-Master. On MS COCO, our model achieves 42.4% AP with 1.62ms latency, outperforming YOLOv13-N by +0.8% mAP and 17.8% faster inference. Notably, the gains are most pronounced on challenging dense scenes, while the model preserves efficiency on typical inputs and maintains real-time inference speed. Code will be available.
tldr: YOLO-Master introduces a novel Mixture-of-Experts approach to YOLO-like object detection, dynamically allocating computational resources based on scene complexity, leading to improved accuracy and speed, especially in dense scenes.
tldr_zh: YOLO-Master 提出了一种新的混合专家方法来改进 YOLO 类目标检测，通过根据场景复杂性动态分配计算资源，从而提高准确率和速度，尤其是在密集场景中。
summary_zh: 现有实时目标检测（RTOD）方法通常采用YOLO类架构，因其在准确率和速度之间取得了良好的折衷。然而，这些模型依赖于静态密集计算，对所有输入应用统一的处理方式，错误地分配了表征能力和计算资源，例如对简单场景过度分配，而对复杂场景服务不足。这种不匹配导致了计算冗余和次优的检测性能。为了克服这个局限性，我们提出了一种新颖的YOLO类框架YOLO-Master，它为RTOD引入了实例条件自适应计算。这是通过高效稀疏混合专家（ES-MoE）模块实现的，该模块根据场景复杂性动态地为每个输入分配计算资源。其核心是一个轻量级的动态路由网络，通过多样性增强目标引导训练期间的专家专业化，鼓励专家之间形成互补的专业知识。此外，路由网络自适应地学习仅激活最相关的专家，从而在最小化推理期间的计算开销的同时提高检测性能。在五个大型基准数据集上进行的全面实验证明了YOLO-Master的优越性。在MS COCO上，我们的模型以1.62毫秒的延迟实现了42.4%的AP，优于YOLOv13-N +0.8% mAP，并且推理速度快了17.8%。值得注意的是，增益在具有挑战性的密集场景中最为显著，同时该模型保持了典型输入的效率并维持了实时推理速度。代码即将开源。

title: From geometry to dynamics: Learning overdamped Langevin dynamics from sparse observations with geometric constraints
summary: How can we learn the laws underlying the dynamics of stochastic systems when their trajectories are sampled sparsely in time? Existing methods either require temporally resolved high-frequency observations, or rely on geometric arguments that apply only to conservative systems, limiting the range of dynamics they can recover. Here, we present a new framework that reconciles these two perspectives by reformulating inference as a stochastic control problem. Our method uses geometry-driven path augmentation, guided by the geometry in the system's invariant density to reconstruct likely trajectories and infer the underlying dynamics without assuming specific parametric models. Applied to overdamped Langevin systems, our approach accurately recovers stochastic dynamics even from extremely undersampled data, outperforming existing methods in synthetic benchmarks. This work demonstrates the effectiveness of incorporating geometric inductive biases into stochastic system identification methods.
tldr: This paper presents a new method for learning stochastic dynamics from sparse trajectory data by combining stochastic control and geometry-driven path augmentation, specifically for overdamped Langevin systems. It outperforms existing methods in recovering dynamics from undersampled data.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种新的方法，通过结合随机控制和几何驱动的路径增强，从稀疏的轨迹数据中学习随机动力学，特别适用于过阻尼朗之万系统。在从欠采样数据中恢复动力学方面，该方法优于现有方法。
summary_zh: 我们如何从时间上稀疏采样的随机系统轨迹中学习其潜在动力学规律？现有方法要么需要时间分辨的高频观测，要么依赖于仅适用于保守系统的几何论证，限制了它们能够恢复的动力学范围。在此，我们提出了一种新的框架，通过将推断重新表述为随机控制问题，来调和这两种观点。我们的方法使用几何驱动的路径增强，以系统不变密度中的几何结构为指导，重构可能的轨迹，并在不假设特定参数模型的情况下推断潜在动力学。应用于过阻尼朗之万系统，即使从极度欠采样的数据中，我们的方法也能准确地恢复随机动力学，并在合成基准测试中优于现有方法。这项工作证明了将几何归纳偏置纳入随机系统辨识方法的有效性。

title: The N-5 Scaling Law: Topological Dimensionality Reduction in the Optimal Design of Fully-actuated Multirotors
summary: The geometric design of fully-actuated and omnidirectional N-rotor aerial vehicles is conventionally formulated as a parametric optimization problem, seeking a single optimal set of N orientations within a fixed architectural family. This work departs from that paradigm to investigate the intrinsic topological structure of the optimization landscape itself. We formulate the design problem on the product manifold of Projective Lines \RP^2^N, fixing the rotor positions to the vertices of polyhedral chassis while varying their lines of action. By minimizing a coordinate-invariant Log-Volume isotropy metric, we reveal that the topology of the global optima is governed strictly by the symmetry of the chassis. For generic (irregular) vertex arrangements, the solutions appear as a discrete set of isolated points. However, as the chassis geometry approaches regularity, the solution space undergoes a critical phase transition, collapsing onto an N-dimensional Torus of the lines tangent at the vertexes to the circumscribing sphere of the chassis, and subsequently reducing to continuous 1-dimensional curves driven by Affine Phase Locking. We synthesize these observations into the N-5 Scaling Law: an empirical relationship holding for all examined regular planar polygons and Platonic solids (N <= 10), where the space of optimal configurations consists of K=N-5 disconnected 1D topological branches. We demonstrate that these locking patterns correspond to a sequence of admissible Star Polygons {N/q}, allowing for the exact prediction of optimal phases for arbitrary N. Crucially, this topology reveals a design redundancy that enables optimality-preserving morphing: the vehicle can continuously reconfigure along these branches while preserving optimal isotropic control authority.
tldr: This paper investigates the topological structure of the design space for fully-actuated multirotors, revealing an N-5 scaling law where optimal configurations collapse into 1D branches corresponding to star polygons, enabling optimality-preserving morphing.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了全驱动多旋翼飞行器设计空间中的拓扑结构，揭示了一个N-5缩放定律，其中最优配置坍缩为对应于星形多边形的1D分支，从而实现保持最优性的变形。
summary_zh: 全驱动全向N旋翼飞行器的几何设计通常被表述为一个参数优化问题，旨在在一个固定的结构族内寻找唯一的最佳N个方向集合。这项工作改变了该范式，转而研究优化景象本身的内在拓扑结构。我们将设计问题表述在射影线\RP^2^N的积流形上，固定旋翼位置于多面体底盘的顶点，同时改变它们的作用线。通过最小化坐标不变的对数体积各向同性度量，我们揭示了全局最优解的拓扑结构严格地由底盘的对称性控制。对于一般（不规则）顶点排列，解表现为一组离散的孤立点。然而，随着底盘几何形状接近规则性，解空间经历一个临界相变，坍缩到底盘外接球顶点切线的N维环面，随后通过仿射相位锁定缩减为连续的1维曲线。我们将这些观察结果综合成N-5缩放律：一个适用于所有经过检验的规则平面多边形和柏拉图正多面体（N <= 10）的经验关系，其中最优构型的空间由K=N-5个不连通的1维拓扑分支组成。我们证明了这些锁定模式对应于一系列容许的星形多边形{N/q}，允许对任意N的最优相位进行精确预测。至关重要的是，这种拓扑结构揭示了一种设计冗余，从而能够实现保优变形：飞行器可以沿着这些分支持续重新配置，同时保持最佳的各向同性控制权限。

title: Unsupervised Learning for Detection of Rare Driving Scenarios
summary: The detection of rare and hazardous driving scenarios is a critical challenge for ensuring the safety and reliability of autonomous systems. This research explores an unsupervised learning framework for detecting rare and extreme driving scenarios using naturalistic driving data (NDD). We leverage the recently proposed Deep Isolation Forest (DIF), an anomaly detection algorithm that combines neural network-based feature representations with Isolation Forests (IFs), to identify non-linear and complex anomalies. Data from perception modules, capturing vehicle dynamics and environmental conditions, is preprocessed into structured statistical features extracted from sliding windows. The framework incorporates t-distributed stochastic neighbor embedding (t-SNE) for dimensionality reduction and visualization, enabling better interpretability of detected anomalies. Evaluation is conducted using a proxy ground truth, combining quantitative metrics with qualitative video frame inspection. Our results demonstrate that the proposed approach effectively identifies rare and hazardous driving scenarios, providing a scalable solution for anomaly detection in autonomous driving systems. Given the study's methodology, it was unavoidable to depend on proxy ground truth and manually defined feature combinations, which do not encompass the full range of real-world driving anomalies or their nuanced contextual dependencies.
tldr: This paper proposes an unsupervised learning framework using Deep Isolation Forest (DIF) for detecting rare and hazardous driving scenarios from naturalistic driving data, achieving scalable anomaly detection.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度孤立森林（DIF）的无监督学习框架，用于从自然驾驶数据中检测罕见和危险的驾驶场景，实现了可扩展的异常检测。
summary_zh: 该研究探索了一种利用自然驾驶数据（NDD）检测罕见和危险驾驶场景的无监督学习框架，检测此类场景对于确保自动驾驶系统的安全性和可靠性至关重要。我们利用最近提出的深度隔离森林（DIF），这是一种结合了基于神经网络的特征表示和隔离森林（IFs）的异常检测算法，来识别非线性和复杂的异常。来自感知模块的数据，包括车辆动力学和环境条件，被预处理成从滑动窗口中提取的结构化统计特征。该框架结合了 t-分布随机邻域嵌入（t-SNE）进行降维和可视化，从而更好地解释检测到的异常。评估采用代理真值，结合定量指标和定性视频帧检查进行。实验结果表明，所提出的方法能有效地识别罕见和危险的驾驶场景，为自动驾驶系统中的异常检测提供一种可扩展的解决方案。鉴于本研究的方法论，不可避免地依赖于代理真值和手动定义的特征组合，这些并不能涵盖现实世界驾驶异常的全部范围或其细微的上下文依赖关系。

title: Assessing behaviour coverage in a multi-agent system simulation for autonomous vehicle testing
summary:
As autonomous vehicle technology advances, ensuring the safety and reliability of these systems becomes paramount. Consequently, comprehensive testing methodologies are essential to evaluate the performance of autonomous vehicles in diverse and complex real-world scenarios. This study focuses on the behaviour coverage analysis of a multi-agent system simulation designed for autonomous vehicle testing, and provides a systematic approach to measure and assess behaviour coverage within the simulation environment. By defining a set of driving scenarios, and agent interactions, we evaluate the extent to which the simulation encompasses a broad range of behaviours relevant to autonomous driving.
  Our findings highlight the importance of behaviour coverage in validating the effectiveness and robustness of autonomous vehicle systems. Through the analysis of behaviour coverage metrics and coverage-based testing, we identify key areas for improvement and optimization in the simulation framework. Thus, a Model Predictive Control (MPC) pedestrian agent is proposed, where its objective function is formulated to encourage \textit{interesting} tests while promoting a more realistic behaviour than other previously studied pedestrian agents. This research contributes to advancing the field of autonomous vehicle testing by providing insights into the comprehensive evaluation of system behaviour in simulated environments. The results offer valuable implications for enhancing the safety, reliability, and performance of autonomous vehicles through rigorous testing methodologies.
tldr: This paper proposes a systematic approach to measure and assess behavior coverage within a multi-agent simulation designed for autonomous vehicle testing, introducing an MPC-based pedestrian agent to encourage more realistic and interesting test scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种系统的方法来测量和评估多智能体仿真中用于自动驾驶车辆测试的行为覆盖率，并引入了一种基于 MPC 的行人代理，以鼓励更真实和有趣的测试场景。
summary_zh:
随着自动驾驶技术的进步，确保这些系统的安全性和可靠性变得至关重要。因此，全面的测试方法对于评估自动驾驶车辆在各种复杂真实场景中的性能至关重要。本研究侧重于用于自动驾驶车辆测试的多智能体系统仿真的行为覆盖率分析，并提供了一种系统的方法来测量和评估仿真环境中的行为覆盖率。通过定义一组驾驶场景和智能体交互，我们评估了仿真涵盖与自动驾驶相关的广泛行为的程度。

我们的研究结果强调了行为覆盖率在验证自动驾驶车辆系统的有效性和鲁棒性方面的重要性。通过对行为覆盖率指标和基于覆盖率的测试的分析，我们确定了仿真框架中需要改进和优化的关键领域。因此，我们提出了一种模型预测控制（MPC）行人智能体，其目标函数被设计为鼓励“有趣的”测试，同时促进比之前研究的其他行人智能体更真实的行为。这项研究通过提供对模拟环境中系统行为的全面评估的见解，为推进自动驾驶车辆测试领域做出了贡献。研究结果为通过严格的测试方法，提高自动驾驶车辆的安全性、可靠性和性能提供了有价值的启示。

title: PCR-ORB: Enhanced ORB-SLAM3 with Point Cloud Refinement Using Deep Learning-Based Dynamic Object Filtering
summary: Visual Simultaneous Localization and Mapping (vSLAM) systems encounter substantial challenges in dynamic environments where moving objects compromise tracking accuracy and map consistency. This paper introduces PCR-ORB (Point Cloud Refinement ORB), an enhanced ORB-SLAM3 framework that integrates deep learning-based point cloud refinement to mitigate dynamic object interference. Our approach employs YOLOv8 for semantic segmentation combined with CUDA-accelerated processing to achieve real-time performance. The system implements a multi-stage filtering strategy encompassing ground plane estimation, sky region removal, edge filtering, and temporal consistency validation. Comprehensive evaluation on the KITTI dataset (sequences 00-09) demonstrates performance characteristics across different environmental conditions and scene types. Notable improvements are observed in specific sequences, with sequence 04 achieving 25.9% improvement in ATE RMSE and 30.4% improvement in ATE median. However, results show mixed performance across sequences, indicating scenario-dependent effectiveness. The implementation provides insights into dynamic object filtering challenges and opportunities for robust navigation in complex environments.
tldr: This paper presents PCR-ORB, an enhanced ORB-SLAM3 framework using deep learning and CUDA acceleration to filter dynamic objects and improve SLAM performance in dynamic environments, showing mixed results on the KITTI dataset.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了PCR-ORB，一个增强的ORB-SLAM3框架，它利用深度学习和CUDA加速来过滤动态物体，并提高SLAM在动态环境中的性能。在KITTI数据集上的结果显示效果不一。
summary_zh:
摘要：
视觉同步定位与地图构建 (vSLAM) 系统在动态环境中面临着巨大的挑战，移动物体会损害跟踪精度和地图一致性。本文介绍 PCR-ORB (点云精细化 ORB)，这是一个增强的 ORB-SLAM3 框架，它集成了基于深度学习的点云精细化方法，以减轻动态物体的干扰。我们的方法采用 YOLOv8 进行语义分割，并结合 CUDA 加速处理以实现实时性能。该系统实现了一种多阶段过滤策略，包括地面平面估计、天空区域移除、边缘过滤和时间一致性验证。在 KITTI 数据集（序列 00-09）上的全面评估展示了不同环境条件和场景类型下的性能特征。在特定序列中观察到显著改进，其中序列 04 的 ATE RMSE 提高了 25.9%，ATE 中位数提高了 30.4%。然而，结果显示不同序列之间的表现参差不齐，表明其有效性取决于具体场景。该实现为动态物体过滤的挑战以及在复杂环境中实现鲁棒导航的机会提供了深刻见解。

title: Breaking Symmetry-Induced Degeneracy in Multi-Agent Ergodic Coverage via Stochastic Spectral Control
summary: Multi-agent ergodic coverage via Spectral Multiscale Coverage (SMC) provides a principled framework for driving a team of agents so that their collective time-averaged trajectories match a prescribed spatial distribution. While classical SMC has demonstrated empirical success, it can suffer from gradient cancellation, particularly when agents are initialized near symmetry points of the target distribution, leading to undesirable behaviors such as stalling or motion constrained along symmetry axes. In this work, we rigorously characterize the initial conditions and symmetry-induced invariant manifolds that give rise to such directional degeneracy in first-order agent dynamics. To address this, we introduce a stochastic perturbation combined with a contraction term and prove that the resulting dynamics ensure almost-sure escape from zero-gradient manifolds while maintaining mean-square boundedness of agent trajectories. Simulations on symmetric multi-modal reference distributions demonstrate that the proposed stochastic SMC effectively mitigates transient stalling and axis-constrained motion, while ensuring that all agent trajectories remain bounded within the domain.
tldr: This paper addresses symmetry-induced degeneracy in multi-agent ergodic coverage using a stochastic control method, ensuring escape from zero-gradient manifolds while maintaining trajectory boundedness. This enhances the robustness of Spectral Multiscale Coverage (SMC) algorithms.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种随机控制方法，解决了多智能体遍历覆盖中由对称性引起的退化问题，确保逃离零梯度流形，同时保持轨迹有界性。 这增强了谱多尺度覆盖 (SMC) 算法的鲁棒性。
summary_zh: 基于谱多尺度覆盖的多智能体遍历覆盖 (SMC) 提供了一个原则性框架，用于驱动一组智能体，使其集体时间平均轨迹与预定的空间分布相匹配。虽然经典的 SMC 已经展现出实证上的成功，但它可能会遭受梯度抵消的问题，尤其是在智能体被初始化于目标分布的对称点附近时，这会导致不期望的行为，例如停滞或沿对称轴线的受限运动。在这项工作中，我们严格地刻画了在一阶智能体动力学中产生这种方向退化的初始条件和对称性诱导的不变流形。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一种随机扰动，并结合了一个收缩项，并证明了由此产生的动力学可以确保几乎必然地逃离零梯度流形，同时保持智能体轨迹的均方有界性。在对称多模态参考分布上的仿真结果表明，所提出的随机 SMC 有效地缓解了瞬态停滞和轴线约束运动，同时确保所有智能体轨迹保持在域内有界。

title: Towards the Automation in the Space Station: Feasibility Study and Ground Tests of a Multi-Limbed Intra-Vehicular Robot
summary: This paper presents a feasibility study, including simulations and prototype tests, on the autonomous operation of a multi-limbed intra-vehicular robot (mobile manipulator), shortly MLIVR, designed to assist astronauts with logistical tasks on the International Space Station (ISS). Astronauts spend significant time on tasks such as preparation, close-out, and the collection and transportation of goods, reducing the time available for critical mission activities. Our study explores the potential for a mobile manipulator to support these operations, emphasizing the need for autonomous functionality to minimize crew and ground operator effort while enabling real-time task execution. We focused on the robot's transportation capabilities, simulating its motion planning in 3D space. The actual motion execution was tested with a prototype on a 2D table to mimic a microgravity environment. The results demonstrate the feasibility of performing these tasks with minimal human intervention, offering a promising solution to enhance operational efficiency on the ISS.
tldr: This paper presents a feasibility study of using a multi-limbed intra-vehicular robot (MLIVR) to autonomously assist astronauts with logistical tasks on the ISS, demonstrating the potential for improving operational efficiency.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一项可行性研究，探讨使用多肢舱内机器人（MLIVR）自主协助宇航员在国际空间站执行后勤任务，展示了提高运营效率的潜力。
summary_zh: 本文针对一种多肢舱内机器人（移动机械臂），简称MLIVR，旨在辅助国际空间站（ISS）宇航员完成后勤任务，进行了一项可行性研究，包括仿真和原型测试。宇航员在诸如准备、收尾、以及货物收集和运输等任务上花费大量时间，减少了用于执行关键任务活动的时间。我们的研究探讨了使用移动机械臂支持这些操作的潜力，并强调了自主功能的必要性，以最大程度地减少机组人员和地面操作员的工作量，同时实现实时任务执行。我们专注于机器人的运输能力，模拟其在3D空间中的运动规划。实际运动执行通过在2D平台上使用原型进行测试，以模拟微重力环境。结果表明，在最小的人工干预下执行这些任务是可行的，为提高国际空间站的运行效率提供了一种有前景的解决方案。

title: Pole-centric Descriptors for Robust Robot Localization: Evaluation under Pole-at-Distance (PaD) Observations using the Small Pole Landmark (SPL) Dataset
summary: While pole-like structures are widely recognized as stable geometric anchors for long-term robot localization, their identification reliability degrades significantly under Pole-at-Distance (Pad) observations typical of large-scale urban environments. This paper shifts the focus from descriptor design to a systematic investigation of descriptor robustness. Our primary contribution is the establishment of a specialized evaluation framework centered on the Small Pole Landmark (SPL) dataset. This dataset is constructed via an automated tracking-based association pipeline that captures multi-view, multi-distance observations of the same physical landmarks without manual annotation. Using this framework, we present a comparative analysis of Contrastive Learning (CL) and Supervised Learning (SL) paradigms. Our findings reveal that CL induces a more robust feature space for sparse geometry, achieving superior retrieval performance particularly in the 5--10m range. This work provides an empirical foundation and a scalable methodology for evaluating landmark distinctiveness in challenging real-world scenarios.
tldr: This paper introduces a new dataset (SPL) and evaluation framework for assessing the robustness of pole-like landmark descriptors for robot localization, finding that contrastive learning methods perform better than supervised learning, particularly at longer distances.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个新的数据集 (SPL) 和评估框架，用于评估用于机器人定位的杆状地标描述符的鲁棒性，发现对比学习方法比监督学习方法表现更好，尤其是在较远的距离上。
summary_zh: 杆状结构被广泛认为是长期机器人定位的稳定几何锚点，但在大型城市环境中常见的远距离杆（Pad）观测条件下，其识别可靠性会显著降低。本文将重点从描述符设计转移到对描述符鲁棒性的系统性研究。我们的主要贡献是建立了一个以小型杆状地标（SPL）数据集为中心的专门评估框架。该数据集通过一个基于自动跟踪关联的流水线构建，无需人工标注即可捕获相同物理地标的多视角、多距离观测。我们利用该框架，对对比学习（CL）和监督学习（SL）范式进行了比较分析。我们的研究结果表明，对比学习能够为稀疏几何结构诱导更鲁棒的特征空间，尤其是在 5-10 米范围内实现了更卓越的检索性能。这项工作为评估具有挑战性的真实场景中的地标独特性提供了实证基础和可扩展的方法论。

title: Joint Link Adaptation and Device Scheduling Approach for URLLC Industrial IoT Network: A DRL-based Method with Bayesian Optimization
summary: In this article, we consider an industrial internet of things (IIoT) network supporting multi-device dynamic ultra-reliable low-latency communication (URLLC) while the channel state information (CSI) is imperfect. A joint link adaptation (LA) and device scheduling (including the order) design is provided, aiming at maximizing the total transmission rate under strict block error rate (BLER) constraints. In particular, a Bayesian optimization (BO) driven Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) method is proposed, which determines the device served order sequence and the corresponding modulation and coding scheme (MCS) adaptively based on the imperfect CSI. Note that the imperfection of CSI, error sample imbalance in URLLC networks, as well as the parameter sensitivity nature of the TD3 algorithm likely diminish the algorithm's convergence speed and reliability. To address such an issue, we proposed a BO based training mechanism for the convergence speed improvement, which provides a more reliable learning direction and sample selection method to track the imbalance sample problem. Via extensive simulations, we show that the proposed algorithm achieves faster convergence and higher sum-rate performance compared to existing solutions.
tldr: This paper proposes a Bayesian Optimization driven Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) method for joint link adaptation and device scheduling in URLLC Industrial IoT networks with imperfect CSI, aiming to maximize transmission rate under block error rate constraints.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化驱动的Twin Delayed Deep Deterministic Policy Gradient (TD3) 方法，用于不完善的CSI条件下URLLC工业物联网网络中的联合链路自适应和设备调度，旨在最大化块误码率约束下的传输速率。
summary_zh: 本文研究了一种工业物联网（IIoT）网络，该网络支持多设备动态超可靠低延迟通信（URLLC），同时信道状态信息（CSI）不完美。提出了一种联合链路自适应（LA）和设备调度（包括顺序）的设计，旨在在严格的误块率（BLER）约束下最大化总传输速率。特别地，提出了一种基于贝叶斯优化（BO）驱动的双延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）方法，该方法基于不完美的CSI自适应地确定设备服务顺序序列和相应的调制编码方案（MCS）。需要注意的是，CSI的不完美、URLLC网络中的错误样本不平衡，以及TD3算法的参数敏感性可能降低算法的收敛速度和可靠性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于BO的训练机制来提高收敛速度，该机制提供了一种更可靠的学习方向和样本选择方法来跟踪不平衡样本问题。通过大量的仿真实验，我们表明，与现有解决方案相比，所提出的算法能实现更快的收敛速度和更高的总速率性能。

title: AKG kernel Agent: A Multi-Agent Framework for Cross-Platform Kernel Synthesis
summary: Modern AI models demand high-performance computation kernels. The growing complexity of LLMs, multimodal architectures, and recommendation systems, combined with techniques like sparsity and quantization, creates significant computational challenges. Moreover, frequent hardware updates and diverse chip architectures further complicate this landscape, requiring tailored kernel implementations for each platform. However, manual optimization cannot keep pace with these demands, creating a critical bottleneck in AI system development. Recent advances in LLM code generation capabilities have opened new possibilities for automating kernel development. In this work, we propose AKG kernel agent (AI-driven Kernel Generator), a multi-agent system that automates kernel generation, migration, and performance tuning. AKG kernel agent is designed to support multiple domain-specific languages (DSLs), including Triton, TileLang, CPP, and CUDA-C, enabling it to target different hardware backends while maintaining correctness and portability. The system's modular design allows rapid integration of new DSLs and hardware targets. When evaluated on KernelBench using Triton DSL across GPU and NPU backends, AKG kernel agent achieves an average speedup of 1.46$\times$ over PyTorch Eager baselines implementations, demonstrating its effectiveness in accelerating kernel development for modern AI workloads.
tldr: The paper introduces AKG kernel agent, a multi-agent system that automates kernel generation and optimization for diverse hardware platforms, achieving speedups compared to PyTorch baselines on KernelBench.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为AKG kernel agent的多智能体系统，该系统可以自动生成和优化针对各种硬件平台的内核，并在KernelBench上实现了相对于PyTorch基线的加速。
summary_zh: 现代人工智能模型对高性能计算内核提出了需求。LLM、多模态架构和推荐系统日趋复杂，加上稀疏性和量化等技术的使用，带来了巨大的计算挑战。此外，频繁的硬件更新和多样化的芯片架构进一步使情况复杂化，需要为每个平台量身定制内核实现。然而，手动优化无法跟上这些需求，在人工智能系统开发中造成了关键瓶颈。LLM代码生成能力的最新进展为自动化内核开发开辟了新的可能性。在这项工作中，我们提出了 AKG 内核代理（AI驱动的内核生成器），一个多代理系统，可以自动化内核生成、迁移和性能调优。AKG 内核代理旨在支持包括 Triton、TileLang、CPP 和 CUDA-C 在内的多种领域特定语言 (DSL)，使其能够以不同的硬件后端为目标，同时保持正确性和可移植性。该系统的模块化设计允许快速集成新的 DSL 和硬件目标。当在 GPU 和 NPU 后端使用 Triton DSL 对 KernelBench 进行评估时，AKG 内核代理比 PyTorch Eager 基线实现平均实现了 1.46 倍的加速，证明了其在加速现代人工智能工作负载的内核开发方面的有效性。

title: SURE Guided Posterior Sampling: Trajectory Correction for Diffusion-Based Inverse Problems
summary: Diffusion models have emerged as powerful learned priors for solving inverse problems. However, current iterative solving approaches which alternate between diffusion sampling and data consistency steps typically require hundreds or thousands of steps to achieve high quality reconstruction due to accumulated errors. We address this challenge with SURE Guided Posterior Sampling (SGPS), a method that corrects sampling trajectory deviations using Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimate (SURE) gradient updates and PCA based noise estimation. By mitigating noise induced errors during the critical early and middle sampling stages, SGPS enables more accurate posterior sampling and reduces error accumulation. This allows our method to maintain high reconstruction quality with fewer than 100 Neural Function Evaluations (NFEs). Our extensive evaluation across diverse inverse problems demonstrates that SGPS consistently outperforms existing methods at low NFE counts.
tldr: This paper introduces SURE Guided Posterior Sampling (SGPS), a method that improves diffusion model-based inverse problem solving by correcting sampling trajectory deviations using Stein's Unbiased Risk Estimate (SURE) and PCA based noise estimation, enabling high-quality reconstruction with fewer steps.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了SURE引导的后验采样（SGPS）方法，通过使用Stein无偏风险估计（SURE）和基于PCA的噪声估计来校正采样轨迹偏差，从而改进了基于扩散模型的逆问题求解，并能以更少的步骤实现高质量重建。
summary_zh: 扩散模型已成为解决逆问题的强大可学习先验。然而，目前在扩散采样和数据一致性步骤之间交替进行的迭代求解方法，由于累积误差，通常需要数百甚至数千步才能实现高质量的重建。我们提出了一种名为SURE引导后验采样(SGPS)的方法来解决这个挑战，该方法使用斯坦因无偏风险估计(SURE)梯度更新和基于PCA的噪声估计来校正采样轨迹偏差。通过减轻关键的早期和中期采样阶段中噪声引起的误差，SGPS能够实现更准确的后验采样并减少误差累积。这使得我们的方法能够在低于100次神经函数评估(NFE)的情况下保持高质量的重建效果。我们在各种逆问题上进行的广泛评估表明，SGPS在低NFE计数时始终优于现有方法。

title: GeoTeacher: Geometry-Guided Semi-Supervised 3D Object Detection
summary: Semi-supervised 3D object detection, aiming to explore unlabeled data for boosting 3D object detectors, has emerged as an active research area in recent years. Some previous methods have shown substantial improvements by either employing heterogeneous teacher models to provide high-quality pseudo labels or enforcing feature-perspective consistency between the teacher and student networks. However, these methods overlook the fact that the model usually tends to exhibit low sensitivity to object geometries with limited labeled data, making it difficult to capture geometric information, which is crucial for enhancing the student model's ability in object perception and localization. In this paper, we propose GeoTeacher to enhance the student model's ability to capture geometric relations of objects with limited training data, especially unlabeled data. We design a keypoint-based geometric relation supervision module that transfers the teacher model's knowledge of object geometry to the student, thereby improving the student's capability in understanding geometric relations. Furthermore, we introduce a voxel-wise data augmentation strategy that increases the diversity of object geometries, thereby further improving the student model's ability to comprehend geometric structures. To preserve the integrity of distant objects during augmentation, we incorporate a distance-decay mechanism into this strategy. Moreover, GeoTeacher can be combined with different SS3D methods to further improve their performance. Extensive experiments on the ONCE and Waymo datasets indicate the effectiveness and generalization of our method and we achieve the new state-of-the-art results. Code will be available at https://github.com/SII-Whaleice/GeoTeacher
tldr: GeoTeacher improves semi-supervised 3D object detection by focusing on geometric relations, using keypoint-based supervision and a novel voxel-wise augmentation strategy with distance decay, achieving SOTA results on ONCE and Waymo datasets.
tldr_zh: GeoTeacher通过关注几何关系改进半监督3D目标检测，使用基于关键点的监督和具有距离衰减的新型体素级数据增强策略，在ONCE和Waymo数据集上实现了SOTA结果。
summary_zh: 半监督3D目标检测旨在利用无标签数据提升3D目标检测器的性能，近年来已成为一个活跃的研究领域。以往的一些方法通过采用异构教师模型来提供高质量的伪标签，或者在教师和学生网络之间施加特征视角一致性，从而取得了显著的改进。然而，这些方法忽略了一个事实，即模型通常对具有有限标签数据的目标几何形状表现出较低的敏感性，使其难以捕捉几何信息，而几何信息对于增强学生模型在目标感知和定位方面的能力至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了GeoTeacher来增强学生模型在有限训练数据（尤其是无标签数据）下捕捉目标几何关系的能力。我们设计了一个基于关键点的几何关系监督模块，将教师模型关于目标几何的知识传递给学生模型，从而提高学生模型理解几何关系的能力。此外，我们引入了一种基于体素的数据增强策略，以增加目标几何形状的多样性，从而进一步提高学生模型理解几何结构的能力。为了在增强过程中保持远处目标的完整性，我们在此策略中加入了一个距离衰减机制。此外，GeoTeacher可以与不同的SS3D方法结合，以进一步提高它们的性能。在ONCE和Waymo数据集上的大量实验表明了我们方法的有效性和泛化能力，并且我们实现了新的最先进的结果。代码将在https://github.com/SII-Whaleice/GeoTeacher上提供。

title: FLEX-MoE: Federated Mixture-of-Experts with Load-balanced Expert Assignment
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models enable scalable neural networks through conditional computation. However, their deployment with federated learning (FL) faces two critical challenges: 1) resource-constrained edge devices cannot store full expert sets, and 2) non-IID data distributions cause severe expert load imbalance that degrades model performance. To this end, we propose \textbf{FLEX-MoE}, a novel federated MoE framework that jointly optimizes expert assignment and load balancing under limited client capacity. Specifically, our approach introduces client-expert fitness scores that quantify the expert suitability for local datasets through training feedback, and employs an optimization-based algorithm to maximize client-expert specialization while enforcing balanced expert utilization system-wide. Unlike existing greedy methods that focus solely on personalization while ignoring load imbalance, our FLEX-MoE is capable of addressing the expert utilization skew, which is particularly severe in FL settings with heterogeneous data. Our comprehensive experiments on three different datasets demonstrate the superior performance of the proposed FLEX-MoE, together with its ability to maintain balanced expert utilization across diverse resource-constrained scenarios.
tldr: The paper introduces FLEX-MoE, a federated learning framework that addresses expert load imbalance and client capacity constraints in Mixture-of-Experts models by jointly optimizing expert assignment and load balancing.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了FLEX-MoE，一种联邦学习框架，通过联合优化专家分配和负载均衡，解决了混合专家模型中专家负载不平衡和客户端容量限制的问题。
summary_zh: 混合专家(MoE)模型通过条件计算实现可扩展的神经网络。然而，将其部署于联邦学习(FL)中面临两个关键挑战：1) 资源受限的边缘设备无法存储完整的专家集合，以及 2) 非独立同分布(non-IID)数据分布导致严重的专家负载不平衡，从而降低模型性能。为此，我们提出了\textbf{FLEX-MoE}，一种新型联邦MoE框架，可在有限的客户端容量下联合优化专家分配和负载均衡。具体来说，我们的方法引入了客户端-专家适应度分数，通过训练反馈量化专家对本地数据集的适用性，并采用基于优化的算法来最大化客户端-专家专业化，同时在系统范围内强制执行均衡的专家利用率。与现有的仅关注个性化而忽略负载不平衡的贪婪方法不同，我们的FLEX-MoE能够解决专家利用率倾斜问题，该问题在具有异构数据的联邦学习设置中尤为严重。我们在三个不同的数据集上进行的全面实验表明，所提出的FLEX-MoE具有卓越的性能，以及其在各种资源受限场景下维持平衡专家利用率的能力。

title: Soft Robotic Technological Probe for Speculative Fashion Futures
summary: Emerging wearable robotics demand design approaches that address not only function, but also social meaning. In response, we present Sumbrella, a soft robotic garment developed as a speculative fashion probe. We first detail the design and fabrication of the Sumbrella, including sequenced origami-inspired bistable units, fabric pneumatic actuation chambers, cable driven shape morphing mechanisms, computer vision components, and an integrated wearable system comprising a hat and bolero jacket housing power and control electronics. Through a focus group with twelve creative technologists, we then used Sumbrella as a technological probe to explore how people interpreted, interacted, and imagined future relationships with soft robotic wearables. While Sumbrella allowed our participants to engage in rich discussion around speculative futures and expressive potential, it also surfaced concerns about exploitation, surveillance, and the personal risks and societal ethics of embedding biosensing technologies in public life. We contribute to the Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) field key considerations and recommendations for designing soft robotic garments, including the potential for kinesic communication, the impact of such technologies on social dynamics, and the importance of ethical guidelines. Finally, we provide a reflection on our application of speculative design; proposing that it allows HRI researchers to not only consider functionality, but also how wearable robots influence definitions of what is considered acceptable or desirable in public settings.
tldr: The paper presents Sumbrella, a soft robotic garment, as a speculative fashion probe to explore social meanings and ethical considerations around wearable robotics through a focus group study. It contributes design considerations and recommendations for soft robotic garments in HRI.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为Sumbrella的软体机器人服装，作为一个思辨性时尚探针，通过焦点小组研究探索了可穿戴机器人技术的社会意义和伦理考量。 论文为 HRI 领域提供了关于软体机器人服装的设计考虑因素和建议。
summary_zh: 新兴的可穿戴机器人不仅需要关注功能，还需要关注其社会意义。为此，我们提出了 Sumbrella，这是一种作为推测性时尚探测器而开发的软体机器人服装。我们首先详细介绍了 Sumbrella 的设计和制造，包括有序的折纸启发的双稳态单元、织物气动驱动腔、钢索驱动的形状变形机构、计算机视觉组件以及集成的可穿戴系统（包含帽子和波莱罗短外套，用于容纳电源和控制电子设备）。然后，我们通过一个由十二位创意技术专家组成的焦点小组，将 Sumbrella 作为一种技术探测器，探索人们如何解读、互动以及想象未来与软体机器人可穿戴设备的关系。虽然 Sumbrella 使我们的参与者能够围绕推测性的未来和表达潜力进行深入讨论，但它也引发了对剥削、监视以及在公共生活中嵌入生物传感技术所带来的个人风险和社会伦理的担忧。我们为“人机交互”（HRI）领域贡献了关于软体机器人服装设计的重要考虑因素和建议，包括运动沟通的潜力、此类技术对社会动态的影响以及伦理准则的重要性。最后，我们反思了推测性设计在我们的应用中的作用；认为它使 HRI 研究人员不仅可以考虑功能，还可以考虑可穿戴机器人如何影响对公共场所中可接受或期望的内容的定义。

title: A Sequential Hermaphrodite Coupling Mechanism for Lattice-based Modular Robots
summary: Lattice-based modular robot systems are envisioned for large-scale construction in extreme environments, such as space. Coupling mechanisms for heterogeneous structural modules should meet all of the following requirements: single-sided coupling and decoupling, flat surfaces when uncoupled, and coupling to passive coupling interfaces as well as coupling behavior between coupling mechanisms. The design requirements for such a coupling mechanism are complex. We propose a novel shape-matching mechanical coupling mechanism that satisfies these design requirements. This mechanism enables controlled, sequential transitions between male and female states. When uncoupled, all mechanisms are in the female state. To enable single-sided coupling, one side of the mechanisms switches to the male state during the coupling process. Single-sided decoupling is possible not only from the male side but also from the female side by forcibly switching the opposite mechanism's male state to the female state. This coupling mechanism can be applied to various modular robot systems and robot arm tool changers.
tldr: This paper introduces a novel mechanical coupling mechanism for modular robots designed for single-sided coupling/decoupling in extreme environments, utilizing a sequential hermaphrodite approach to enable male/female state transitions.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新型的模块化机器人机械耦合机构，专为极端环境下的单侧耦合/解耦而设计，采用顺序雌雄同体方法来实现雄性/雌性状态转换。
summary_zh: 基于晶格的模块化机器人系统被设想用于在极端环境中（如太空）进行大规模建造。用于连接异构结构模块的耦合机构应满足以下所有要求：单侧耦合和解耦、未耦合时的平坦表面、以及与被动耦合接口的耦合，以及耦合机构之间的耦合行为。这种耦合机构的设计要求复杂。我们提出了一种新型的形状匹配机械耦合机构，可以满足这些设计要求。该机构能够实现男性和女性状态之间的受控、顺序转换。当未耦合时，所有机构均处于女性状态。为了实现单侧耦合，机构的一侧在耦合过程中切换到男性状态。单侧解耦不仅可以从男性侧进行，也可以通过强制将另一机构的男性状态切换到女性状态而从女性侧进行。这种耦合机构可应用于各种模块化机器人系统和机器人手臂工具更换器。

title: A New Software Tool for Generating and Visualizing Robot Self-Collision Matrices
summary: In robotics, it is common to check whether a given robot state results in self-intersection (i.e., a self-collision query) or to assess its distance from such an intersection (i.e., a self-proximity query). These checks are typically performed between pairs of shapes attached to different robot links. However, many of these shape pairs can be excluded in advance, as their configurations are known to always or never result in contact. This information is typically encoded in a self-collision matrix, where each entry (i, j) indicates whether a check should be performed between shape i and shape j. While the MoveIt Setup Assistant is widely used to generate such matrices, current tools are limited by static visualization, lack of proximity support, rigid single-geometry assumptions, and tedious refinement workflows, hindering flexibility and reuse in downstream robotics applications. In this work, we introduce an interactive tool that overcomes these limitations by generating and visualizing self-collision matrices across multiple shape representations, enabling dynamic inspection, filtering, and refinement of shape pairs. Outputs are provided in both JSON and YAML for easy integration. The system is implemented in Rust and uses the Bevy game engine to deliver high-quality visualizations. We demonstrate its effectiveness on multiple robot platforms, showing that matrices generated using diverse shape types yield faster and more accurate self-collision and self-proximity queries.
tldr: The paper introduces a new software tool for generating and visualizing robot self-collision matrices, addressing limitations of existing tools like the MoveIt Setup Assistant and enabling more efficient self-collision/proximity queries.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个新的软件工具，用于生成和可视化机器人自碰撞矩阵，解决了现有工具（如MoveIt Setup Assistant）的局限性，并能实现更高效的自碰撞/邻近度查询。
summary_zh: 在机器人学中，通常需要检查给定的机器人状态是否导致自相交（即，自碰撞查询），或者评估其与此类相交的距离（即，自邻近查询）。这些检查通常在连接到不同机器人连杆的形状对之间执行。然而，许多这些形状对可以预先排除，因为已知它们的配置总是或永远不会导致接触。此信息通常编码在自碰撞矩阵中，其中每个条目（i，j）指示是否应在形状 i 和形状 j 之间执行检查。虽然 MoveIt Setup Assistant 被广泛用于生成此类矩阵，但当前的工具受到静态可视化、缺乏邻近支持、刚性单几何体假设以及繁琐的细化工作流程的限制，从而阻碍了下游机器人应用中的灵活性和重用性。在这项工作中，我们引入了一个交互式工具，通过生成和可视化跨多种形状表示的自碰撞矩阵来克服这些限制，从而实现形状对的动态检查、过滤和细化。输出以 JSON 和 YAML 两种格式提供，便于集成。该系统使用 Rust 实现，并采用 Bevy 游戏引擎来提供高质量的可视化效果。我们通过多个机器人平台展示了其有效性，表明使用不同形状类型生成的矩阵可以产生更快、更准确的自碰撞和自邻近查询。

title: Fuzzy-Logic and Deep Learning for Environmental Condition-Aware Road Surface Classification
summary: Monitoring states of road surfaces provides valuable information for the planning and controlling vehicles and active vehicle control systems. Classical road monitoring methods are expensive and unsystematic because they require time for measurements. This article proposes an real time system based on weather conditional data and road surface condition data. For this purpose, we collected data with a mobile phone camera on the roads around the campus of the Karlsruhe Institute of Technology. We tested a large number of different image-based deep learning algorithms for road classification. In addition, we used road acceleration data along with road image data for training by using them as images. We compared the performances of acceleration-based and camera image-based approaches. The performances of the simple Alexnet, LeNet, VGG, and Resnet algorithms were compared as deep learning algorithms. For road condition classification, 5 classes were considered: asphalt, damaged asphalt, gravel road, damaged gravel road, pavement road and over 95% accuracy performance was achieved. It is also proposed to use the acceleration or the camera image to classify the road surface according to the weather and the time of day using fuzzy logic.
tldr: This paper proposes a real-time road surface classification system using deep learning and fuzzy logic, leveraging camera and acceleration data for condition-aware classification with over 95% accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习和模糊逻辑的实时路面分类系统，利用摄像头和加速度数据进行条件感知分类，准确率超过95%。
summary_zh: 道路表面状态监测为车辆规划、控制以及主动车辆控制系统提供了有价值的信息。传统的道路监测方法成本高昂且缺乏系统性，因为需要时间进行测量。本文提出了一种基于天气条件数据和道路表面状况数据的实时系统。为此，我们利用移动电话摄像头收集了卡尔斯鲁厄理工学院校园周边道路的数据。我们测试了大量不同的基于图像的深度学习算法用于道路分类。此外，我们还将道路加速度数据与道路图像数据一起用于训练，将其作为图像使用。我们比较了基于加速度的方法和基于摄像头图像的方法的性能。作为深度学习算法，我们比较了简单Alexnet、LeNet、VGG和Resnet算法的性能。针对道路状况分类，我们考虑了5个类别：沥青路面、损坏的沥青路面、砾石路、损坏的砾石路和铺路路面，并实现了超过95%的准确率。本文还提出使用加速度或摄像头图像，利用模糊逻辑根据天气和时间对道路表面进行分类。

title: Exploring Syn-to-Real Domain Adaptation for Military Target Detection
summary: Object detection is one of the key target tasks of interest in the context of civil and military applications. In particular, the real-world deployment of target detection methods is pivotal in the decision-making process during military command and reconnaissance. However, current domain adaptive object detection algorithms consider adapting one domain to another similar one only within the scope of natural or autonomous driving scenes. Since military domains often deal with a mixed variety of environments, detecting objects from multiple varying target domains poses a greater challenge. Several studies for armored military target detection have made use of synthetic aperture radar (SAR) data due to its robustness to all weather, long range, and high-resolution characteristics. Nevertheless, the costs of SAR data acquisition and processing are still much higher than those of the conventional RGB camera, which is a more affordable alternative with significantly lower data processing time. Furthermore, the lack of military target detection datasets limits the use of such a low-cost approach. To mitigate these issues, we propose to generate RGB-based synthetic data using a photorealistic visual tool, Unreal Engine, for military target detection in a cross-domain setting. To this end, we conducted synthetic-to-real transfer experiments by training our synthetic dataset and validating on our web-collected real military target datasets. We benchmark the state-of-the-art domain adaptation methods distinguished by the degree of supervision on our proposed train-val dataset pair, and find that current methods using minimal hints on the image (e.g., object class) achieve a substantial improvement over unsupervised or semi-supervised DA methods. From these observations, we recognize the current challenges that remain to be overcome.
tldr: This paper explores synthetic-to-real domain adaptation for military target detection, using Unreal Engine to generate synthetic RGB data and benchmarking existing domain adaptation methods. It finds that methods using minimal supervision achieve better performance.
tldr_zh: 本文探索了军事目标检测的合成到真实域自适应方法，使用虚幻引擎生成合成RGB数据，并对现有域自适应方法进行了基准测试。研究发现，使用最少监督的方法表现更好。
summary_zh: 目标检测是民用和军事领域关注的关键目标任务之一。 特别是，目标检测方法在现实世界中的部署对于军事指挥和侦察过程中的决策至关重要。 然而，当前领域自适应目标检测算法仅考虑在自然或自动驾驶场景范围内将一个领域适配到另一个相似领域。 由于军事领域经常处理各种混合环境，因此从多个不同的目标领域检测目标提出了更大的挑战。 针对装甲军事目标检测的几项研究利用了合成孔径雷达 (SAR) 数据，因为它具有全天候、远距离和高分辨率的特性。 然而，SAR 数据的采集和处理成本仍然远高于传统 RGB 相机，后者是更经济实惠的替代方案，数据处理时间也显著缩短。 此外，军事目标检测数据集的缺乏限制了这种低成本方法的使用。 为了缓解这些问题，我们提出使用照片般逼真的视觉工具 Unreal Engine 生成基于 RGB 的合成数据，用于跨领域环境中的军事目标检测。 为此，我们通过训练我们的合成数据集并验证我们从网络收集的真实军事目标数据集，进行了合成到真实的迁移实验。 我们以我们提出的训练-验证数据集对为基准，评估了当前最先进的领域自适应方法，并按监督程度进行了区分。我们发现，当前使用图像上的最小提示（例如，对象类别）的方法比无监督或半监督 DA 方法取得了显著的改进。 从这些观察中，我们认识到当前仍然需要克服的挑战。

title: A Kalman Filter-Based Disturbance Observer for Steer-by-Wire Systems
summary: Steer-by-Wire systems replace mechanical linkages, which provide benefits like weight reduction, design flexibility, and compatibility with autonomous driving. However, they are susceptible to high-frequency disturbances from unintentional driver torque, known as driver impedance, which can degrade steering performance. Existing approaches either rely on direct torque sensors, which are costly and impractical, or lack the temporal resolution to capture rapid, high-frequency driver-induced disturbances. We address this limitation by designing a Kalman filter-based disturbance observer that estimates high-frequency driver torque using only motor state measurements. We model the drivers passive torque as an extended state using a PT1-lag approximation and integrate it into both linear and nonlinear Steer-by-Wire system models. In this paper, we present the design, implementation and simulation of this disturbance observer with an evaluation of different Kalman filter variants. Our findings indicate that the proposed disturbance observer accurately reconstructs driver-induced disturbances with only minimal delay 14ms. We show that a nonlinear extended Kalman Filter outperforms its linear counterpart in handling frictional nonlinearities, improving estimation during transitions from static to dynamic friction. Given the study's methodology, it was unavoidable to rely on simulation-based validation rather than real-world experimentation. Further studies are needed to investigate the robustness of the observers under real-world driving conditions.
tldr: This paper presents a Kalman filter-based disturbance observer designed to estimate and mitigate high-frequency driver torque disturbances in Steer-by-Wire systems, validated through simulations.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于卡尔曼滤波器的扰动观测器，旨在估计和抑制线控转向系统中的高频驾驶员扭矩扰动，并通过仿真进行了验证。
summary_zh: 线控转向系统取代了机械连接，从而带来重量减轻、设计灵活性以及与自动驾驶的兼容性等优点。然而，它们容易受到来自驾驶员无意扭矩（称为驾驶员阻抗）的高频扰动的影响，这会降低转向性能。现有的方法要么依赖于昂贵的且不切实际的直接扭矩传感器，要么缺乏捕捉快速、高频驾驶员引起的扰动的时间分辨率。我们通过设计一个基于卡尔曼滤波器的扰动观测器来解决这一局限性，该观测器仅使用电机状态测量值来估计高频驾驶员扭矩。我们使用PT1迟滞近似将驾驶员的被动扭矩建模为扩展状态，并将其集成到线性和非线性线控转向系统模型中。在本文中，我们介绍了该扰动观测器的设计、实现和仿真，并评估了不同的卡尔曼滤波变体。我们的研究结果表明，所提出的扰动观测器能够以仅14毫秒的最小延迟准确重建驾驶员引起的扰动。我们表明，非线性扩展卡尔曼滤波器在处理摩擦非线性方面优于其线性对应方法，从而改善了静态摩擦向动态摩擦过渡期间的估计。鉴于本研究的方法，不可避免地需要依赖基于仿真的验证，而不是真实的实验。 需要进一步研究以调查观测器在真实驾驶条件下的鲁棒性。

title: On Conformant Planning and Model-Checking of $\exists^*\forall^*$ Hyperproperties
summary: We study the connection of two problems within the planning and verification community: Conformant planning and model-checking of hyperproperties. Conformant planning is the task of finding a sequential plan that achieves a given objective independent of non-deterministic action effects during the plan's execution. Hyperproperties are system properties that relate multiple execution traces of a system and, e.g., capture information-flow and fairness policies. In this paper, we show that model-checking of $\exists^*\forall^*$ hyperproperties is closely related to the problem of computing a conformant plan. Firstly, we show that we can efficiently reduce a hyperproperty model-checking instance to a conformant planning instance, and prove that our encoding is sound and complete. Secondly, we establish the converse direction: Every conformant planning problem is, itself, a hyperproperty model-checking task.
tldr: This paper explores the connection between conformant planning (finding plans robust to non-deterministic effects) and model-checking of $\exists^*\forall^*$ hyperproperties, demonstrating bidirectional reductions between the two problems.
tldr_zh: 本文探讨了符合规划（寻找对非确定性效应具有鲁棒性的计划）与 $\exists^*\forall^*$ 超性质的模型检查之间的联系，展示了这两个问题之间的双向规约。
summary_zh: 我们研究了规划和验证领域内两个问题之间的联系：符合性规划和超性质的模型检测。符合性规划的任务是找到一个顺序规划，在规划执行期间，无论非确定性动作的影响如何，该规划都能实现给定的目标。超性质是与系统的多个执行迹相关联的系统性质，例如，捕捉信息流和公平性策略。在本文中，我们表明 $\exists^*\forall^*$ 超性质的模型检测与计算符合性规划的问题密切相关。首先，我们证明可以有效地将超性质模型检测实例规约到符合性规划实例，并证明我们的编码是可靠且完备的。其次，我们确立了相反的方向：每个符合性规划问题本身都是一个超性质模型检测任务。
